title: read_verilog: don't include empty `opt_sva_label` in span

features.name: assert inside if block in clocked always
features.description: Code should include an assert statement with a relational expression inside an if block that is within a clocked always @(posedge clk) block
features.snippet:
always @(posedge clk)
  if (ack) begin
    assert(data != 8'h0a);
  end
